prestazioni: 3S-GE BEAMS (Black Top) engine swap with Tomei 272°/11.5mm lift camshafts, HKS Hi-Power 70mm titanium intake manifold, and GReddy Trust T88-34D turbocharger (1.25 A/R turbine housing) running 1.2 bar boost on a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom 3D-printed intake plenum (polycarbonate) and AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor for closed-loop AFR targeting 11.8:1 under full load

OS Giken 1.5-way mechanical LSD with 4.625 final drive ratio (Toyota JZX100 8-inch ring gear conversion) paired with Cusco Type-RS 2-way adjustable rear subframe collars and Nismo 4.10:1 ring & pinion set for drag strip launches

Tein Flex Z coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 6kg/mm rear springs, Swift Springs 10mm front camber plates, Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow), and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) with spherical end links for flat cornering on Tsukuba Circuit
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (front fenders + rear quarter panels) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (15mm wider front, 20mm wider rear) and Rocket Bunny rear bumper lip (JDM-spec, no reverse lights) for aggressive stance over Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +15 (front) and 18x10.5 +25 (rear) wheels

J's Racing carbon fiber hood (3-piece, vented) with integrated NACA ducts feeding the GReddy intercooler, paired with Seibon carbon fiber trunk (lightweight, no spoiler) and RE Amemiya GT-II side skirts (JZX100-compatible, no rivets)

Custom LED taillight conversion (Osram LED chips, sequential startup animation) with smoked lenses (3M Scotchcal 20% tint), DRL delete (filled with carbon fiber), and JDM Altezza RS200 front bumper lip (OEM Toyota part 53111-20020) painted in Gunmetal Metallic (1G3)
